test.command: cargo test -j 4 && (cd src-tauri && cargo test -j 4) && (cd frontend && npm test -- --run)

blockingIssues.description: Malformed snapshot mapping errors in validate_mappings use `Err(format!(...).into())`, which maps into `CsvAlignError::Internal` and returns HTTP 500 instead of the expected BadInput/HTTP 400 for user input validation failures.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify rust-worker TDD policy for behavior-preserving refactor/instrumentation features, and require explicit handoff deviation notes when test-first is intentionally skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple m3 reviews reported TDD-process mismatches (`m3-csv-align-error-introduce`, `m3-unify-validate-selected-columns`, `m3-tracing-instrument-on-handlers`, `m3-handler-attachment-helper`).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit examples for running single integration tests (`cargo test --test <binary_name>`) and warn that passing a file path acts as a name filter and may run zero tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for `m3-migrate-to-csv-align-error` captured a verification command that executed zero tests due to incorrect Cargo invocation form.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce the request-path no-panic rule with an explicit check for `unwrap/expect` in handlers and add guidance to return typed errors instead.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for `m3-handler-attachment-helper` found `expect(...)` in `src/api/handlers.rs` request path; recorded as a non-blocking issue.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that `String`/`&str` conversions into `CsvAlignError` become `Internal` and should be avoided for user-input validation failures (use explicit BadInput/Validation variants).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Blocking issue in `m3-migrate-to-csv-align-error` came from `format!(...).into()` in snapshot validation mapping to `CsvAlignError::Internal`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Feature verification-step text drift (e.g., stale `rg` match counts or ambiguous regexes) in individual feature metadata entries.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected for this synthesis because the findings are feature-definition hygiene issues rather than milestone runtime/system behavior defects.

rejectedObservations.observation: Per-feature omission of reading `.factory/library/user-testing.md` in rust-worker transcripts.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as ambiguous for this milestone: it did not correlate with the discovered blocking defect and may be an over-broad startup requirement for backend-only work.

rejectedObservations.observation: Single-feature TDD deviations that duplicate the broader systemic TDD-policy mismatch recommendation.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as duplicates after consolidating into one systemic skill-guidance recommendation.
